name: codex-consultants
description: Use bounded, read-only Agy, Hermes, or OpenCode consultations while Codex remains the primary investigator and implementer, including the /opencode command.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only Agy, Hermes, and OpenCode opinions for Codex
interface.longDescription: Consult Antigravity with Gemini 3.6 Flash High by default, Hermes with NVIDIA NIM, or OpenCode CLI with Laguna S 2.1 Free at high reasoning by default through the /opencode command for bounded adversarial review while Codex independently validates findings, makes changes, and runs tests.
defaultPrompt: Use Agy, Hermes, or OpenCode as a bounded read-only second opinion while Codex remains primary.
Run /opencode for the default free OpenCode review.
